title: アルダンの寄り道講座・変則編

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan and I have just finished our errands
when I happen to glance at my watch. It's still a
little soon to be heading back...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. Might I interest you in another small
detour?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Great. Now, where shall we go today...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Oh! Hello, Ardan! And her trainer, too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Greetings, Spe, Oguri. Are you on an excursion?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Spe and I are heading to this ramen place
called Hefty Noodle Hammerbolt.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hammerbolt... That's a unique name, isn't it?
choice_data_list: Do you want to check it out?
Do you want to check it out?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Well, venturing into the unknown is the true
charm of the detour. As a connoisseur, I cannot
pass up this opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: So... shall we join them on this venture? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we head to the Hefty Noodle
Hammerbolt.. Upon arriving, however...

text_block_list.name: Customer A
text_block_list.text:
Heavy on the veg, ultra heavy oil, and gigante
garly!

text_block_list.name: Customer B
text_block_list.text: Pork triad, heavy oil, light garly!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Veg? Garly? Wh-what could they be talking
about? ...Are all the customers here speaking in
code?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'll have a pork triad, extra heavy on veg and oil,
with a garly giant!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
One Mariana Trench Olympus Eruption, quinty
pork, and go ultra heavy on everything.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...?! You two as well?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yep... Ardan, don't tell me... this is your first
time?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'd be happy to teach you the lingo! Pork is
the main attraction here, and you have to call out
what you want instead of—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I appreciate the offer, but this is all part of
the detour experience... And, as a connoisseur,
the least I can do is place an order unassisted.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Don't fret... If I listen closely, I should be able to
decipher the keywords.

text_block_list.name: Customer C
text_block_list.text: Quarty pork, heavy on the veg!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Customer
text_block_list.text:
Quinty thick pork with a veg Everest! And go ultra
super heavy on the oil!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I think I understand. "Veg" and "garly" are
vegetables and garlic, while the heaviness
indicates the portion size.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Then "quarty" and "quinty" refer to the
complexity and thickness of the broth. Like
quartets and quintets performing for the taste
buds!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Additionally, those mountain names they're
calling out must serve... to invoke grand visions of
flavor!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I understand what everybody's saying! I... I
can place an order! The time has come!

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Comin' up! Veg Hua, light garly, hexa pork.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Are you... sure about this, Ardan?! That bowl
looks like the ruins of an ancient veggie and pork
kingdom!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...Don't strain yourself. We'll help you finish.
Besides, that combo intrigues me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I am the one who summoned forth this
monstrosity. What am I to do?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I am the one who summoned forth this
monstrosity. What am I to do?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! The important thing is to enjoy the food,
without having to force it down!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I was just thinking that mine wasn't really
heavy enough on its own.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But... you two shouldn't have to suffer for my
ineptitude...
choice_data_list: The point of detours is to have fun, right?
The point of detours is to have fun, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, you're right. Well said.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Right then... I shall humbly accept your
assistance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Whew... Due in no small part to your help, that dish was quite enjoyable. Thank you very much! ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Thank you for sharing! Going for a six on the pork broth was intense!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I've never felt this full before. I'm going to
follow your example next time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although I was worried for a moment there, it
looks like this detour has ended up as a pleasant
memory for everyone involved.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Yes. As the one who placed the order, it falls to
me to slay this beast.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm unsure as to how long my stomach will hold
out...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But that's precisely why I'm going to focus
exclusively on the task before me. I shall unleash
my full power... here and now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: The time has come... Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Mejiro Ardan gallantly gets to work.
Soon, however...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...It's impossible!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her attempt to best the beast she called forth
ends in a disheartened defeat...
